body:
closes #1503 - This PR updates the land calibration pipeline to use the `GEnsembleBuilder` struct in ClimaCalibrate which automate building the G ensemble matrix from `OutputVar`s.

TODO

- [x] Remove preprocessing step of replacing NaNs with the average non nan values and applying ocean mask. This is not needed because GEnsembleBuilder knows how to pick only the values over land.
title: Use G ensemble builder for land calibration
